title: Monday.com for website design and build project timeline and Google calendar integration

posts.author: AliceP (Alice Peperell)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Community,

Does anyone have any examples of a project board used for a website design and development? I’d love to see how others have approached this in Monday.com.

Also, wondered if people are using integrations with Google calendar and how this is achieved?

Thanks in advance for any tips and advice!

posts.cookedHtml:
